multiplayer.title: Multiplayer Mayhem
multiplayer.desc: Play with 4-12 players online. Real-time deception and deduction.

roles.title: 14 Unique Roles
roles.desc: From Mafia to Doctor, Cop to Jester — every game is different.

voice.title: Voice Chat
voice.desc: Built-in voice chat for immersive gameplay. Talk, bluff, and accuse.

ai.title: AI Bots
ai.desc: Practice solo with intelligent AI opponents across 3 difficulty levels.

stats.title: Track Your Stats
stats.desc: Leaderboards, win rates, and detailed game history.

crossplay.title: Cross-Platform
crossplay.desc: Play on any device. Desktop, tablet, or mobile.

step1.title: Create or Join
step1.desc: Create a room and share the code with friends, or join an existing one.

step2.title: Get Your Role
step2.desc: Each player gets a secret role. Mafia kills at night, Town investigates and votes.

step3.title: Discuss & Deceive
step3.desc: During the day, debate who the Mafia is. Lie, bluff, and build trust.

step4.title: Vote & Survive
step4.desc: Vote to eliminate suspects. The last team standing wins!

cta.title: Ready to Play?
cta.subtitle: Enter your name and join a game. No sign-up required.

rolesSection.title: Unique Roles
rolesSection.subtitle: Each role has unique abilities and win strategies

lobby.title: Game Lobby
lobby.shareCode: Share the code with friends to join

game.nightFalls: Night falls over the town... close your eyes
game.dayHasCome: Day has come. Discuss who might be Mafia!

mafia.name: Mafia
mafia.desc: Kills one player every night. Works with fellow mafia members.

godfather.name: Godfather
godfather.desc: The mafia leader. Appears innocent to the Cop. Cannot be killed at night.

doctor.name: Doctor
doctor.desc: Can save one player from death each night.

cop.name: Cop
cop.desc: Can investigate one player each night to learn their alignment.

detective.name: Detective
detective.desc: Can investigate one player each night to learn their exact role.

medic.name: Medic
medic.desc: Can protect a player from death but cannot protect the same player twice in a row.

vigilante.name: Vigilante
vigilante.desc: Can kill one player at night. Uses limited bullets.

sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.desc: Can kill one player every other night.

mayor.name: Mayor
mayor.desc: Your vote counts as 2. Can reveal yourself once to confirm your identity.

villager.name: Villager
villager.desc: No special abilities. Your voice and vote matter during the day.

serial_killer.name: Serial Killer
serial_killer.desc: Kills one player every night. Wins by being the last alive.

jester.name: Jester
jester.desc: Wins only if lynched during the day. No night action.

spy.name: Spy
spy.desc: Can observe one player each night to learn their role.

witch.name: Witch
witch.desc: Has two potions: one to save, one to kill. Each used once.

lovers.name: Lover
lovers.desc: Two lovers. If one dies, the other dies of heartbreak. Win together.

roles.mafiaHint: Mafia members: work together to eliminate the Town.

loading.tip1: Listen carefully to what others say during the day.
loading.tip2: Mafia members can chat privately at night — coordinate wisely.
loading.tip3: The Doctor can save one player each night. Choose carefully.
loading.tip4: The Cop can investigate one player each night to learn their alignment.
loading.tip5: The Jester wins only if they get lynched. Don't fall for their tricks!
loading.tip6: The Mayor's vote counts as two. A powerful hidden role.
loading.tip7: Lovers win together. If one dies, the other dies of heartbreak.
loading.tip8: The Witch has two potions: one to save, one to kill. Use them wisely.
loading.tip9: Trust no one. Anyone could be Mafia.
loading.tip10: The Godfather appears innocent to the Cop. Don't trust investigations blindly.
loading.tip11: The Serial Killer wins alone. Watch out for solo players.
loading.tip12: Vote strategically — one wrong elimination could cost your team the game.
